name: AP (Thailand) Public Company Limited
summary: AP (Thailand) Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the real estate development activities in Thailand. It operates in three segments: Low√Ç¬ñRise, High√Ç¬ñRise, and Other. The company develops single detached houses, townhouses, and condominiums; and provides after sales, property management and brokerage, and construction services. It also provides education and training services. The company was formerly known as Asian Property Development Public Company Limited and changed its name to AP (Thailand) Public Company Limited in May 2013. AP (Thailand) Public Company Limited was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
